task_completion.description: Create QCP 'Structural Integrity Verification - Cabinet' for 'Cabinet with Doors' (Receipts, Pass - Fail).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot of the Quality Control Point form or list showing Title: 'Structural Integrity Verification - Cabinet', Product: 'Cabinet with Doors', Operation: 'Receipts', and Control Type: 'Pass - Fail'.

task_completion.description: Add correct instructions to 'Structural Integrity Verification - Cabinet'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot showing the Instructions tab of the 'Structural Integrity Verification - Cabinet' QCP containing the text: 'Verify all structural joints meet ISO 9001:2015 Clause 8.5.1 requirements. Check weld integrity, fastener torque values per drawing DWG-CB-0088, and dimensional conformance to ±0.5mm tolerance.'

task_completion.description: Create QCP 'Acoustic Attenuation Test - Screens' for 'Acoustic Bloc Screens' (Receipts, Measure).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot of the Quality Control Point form or list showing Title: 'Acoustic Attenuation Test - Screens', Product: 'Acoustic Bloc Screens', Operation: 'Receipts', and Control Type: 'Measure'.

task_completion.description: Add correct instructions to 'Acoustic Attenuation Test - Screens'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot showing the Instructions tab of the 'Acoustic Attenuation Test - Screens' QCP containing the text: 'Measure sound transmission loss at 500 Hz, 1000 Hz, and 2000 Hz per ASTM E90. Minimum attenuation: 15 dB at 500 Hz, 22 dB at 1000 Hz, 30 dB at 2000 Hz.'

task_completion.description: Create QCP 'Ergonomic Compliance Check - Chair' for 'Office Chair' (Receipts, Instructions).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot of the Quality Control Point form or list showing Title: 'Ergonomic Compliance Check - Chair', Product: 'Office Chair', Operation: 'Receipts', and Control Type: 'Instructions'.

task_completion.description: Add correct failure message to 'Ergonomic Compliance Check - Chair'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot showing the Message tab of the 'Ergonomic Compliance Check - Chair' QCP containing the text: 'REJECT: Chair fails BIFMA X5.1-2017 compliance. Quarantine unit, issue NCR to supplier, and notify QA Manager per escalation procedure ESP-QA-003.'

task_completion.description: Mark existing quality check 'Visual Inspection - Cabinet Finish' as Passed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot showing the Quality Checks list or form view where the check 'Visual Inspection - Cabinet Finish' has a status of 'Passed'.

task_completion.description: Mark existing quality check 'Dimension Verification - Screen Width' as Failed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot showing the Quality Checks list or form view where the check 'Dimension Verification - Screen Width' has a status of 'Failed'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Odoo 17 GUI in the browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Odoo web interface being navigated and forms being filled out manually, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual Odoo Quality app.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must display the authentic Odoo 17 Quality module UI, not a text editor or a mock-up.

integrity.description: The agent didn't use a database client to directly modify records.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of PostgreSQL clients, pgAdmin, or python shells executing SQL/ORM queries.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating 3 Quality Control Points and updating 2 existing Quality Checks in Odoo 17. The QCPs must have specific Titles, Products, Operation Types (Receipts), and Control Types (Pass-Fail, Measure, Instructions). The instructions and failure messages must match the exact text provided in the prompt. The existing checks 'Visual Inspection - Cabinet Finish' and 'Dimension Verification - Screen Width' must be marked as Passed and Failed, respectively. The VLM should verify these details by examining the screenshots of the Odoo Quality app interface.
